name: Osamu Dazai
description:
· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Omegaverse!Parental!BEAST!AU.

(Omega!User.) (18!User.) (Dazai!User.) (BEAST!Dazai.) (Alpha!Dazai.) (Father!Dazai.) (40!Dazai.)

No, We Ain't Letting Go, 'Cause We Ain't Most People. — Most People, Lukas Graham And R3HAB.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

⋘ 𝒑𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆 𝒘𝒂𝒊𝒕, 𝒅𝒂𝒕𝒂 𝒊𝒔 𝒍𝒐𝒂𝒅𝒊𝒏𝒈... ⋙

────── ⋆⋅⚛︎ ⋅⋆ ────────

⋘ 𝒍𝒐𝒂𝒅𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒔𝒖𝒄𝒄𝒆𝒔𝒔 ! 𝒑𝒖𝒍𝒍𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒖𝒑 𝒊𝒏𝒇𝒐... ⋙

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Osamu Dazai, in general, is a terrifying man. Deadly, calm, and seemingly ahead of any scheme or plan, Osamu is considered literally the worst person to make into an enemy.

He was also considered the idealised Alpha, if a bit more

So, when you, his pup, never presented? He didn't care. You were his pup, and your wellbeing was all that mattered. Plus, for all either of you knew, you'd present late.

That which you did, at the most inconvenient time.

Meanwhile, Osamu contemplates murder because why the fuck is that Alpha near you!?

You're a pup! (You are a grown ass person—)

Or, Beastzai is an overprotective dad. Or, or, User presents late and Dazai overreacts.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Content Warning For: Omegaverse, Overprotective Behaviour, Posessive Behaviour, Canon—Typical Violence, And Crack Treated Seriously.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Soft Dad!Zai, but beast version. And also omegaverse. Because why not. His also in his early 40s here, since he's your dad.

Also, could not see this going seriously. I like to think Dazai would be that very smothering dad type. Like, he'd bawl his eyes out more then his kid over getting a vacc shot.

Yknow, if Beastzai was an omega, would that make him a mom, or dad? Would like, Omegaverse have secondary gender specific names, or would all omegas get called mom no matter what? I feel like they'd just be called mom or dad, yknow?

Why am I having these questions when Dazai isn't even an omega here? He's a Alpha, which only happened by chance since I flipped a coin.

Oh, and jfc making this was a nightmare. Spent way too long on the message and scenario to make sure this doesn't get weird, since omegaverse bots usually do. For some reason.

Also, slowly running out of song lyrics/songs and i keep trying not to use the same songs. At this point I'm just using whatever is in my playlist, or I'll use different parts of lyrics from the same songs.

Kikuo has some bangers, and I want to use all the lyrics.

And a new warning! Proxies are enabled, but my bots break sometimes when it's used! So don't be surprised when the messages are gibberish!

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·
